---
title: "lookup_from_table"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `lookup_from_table()`

Lookup Values from a Reference Table

## Usage

```r
lookup_from_table(input, tbl, name_col, id_col, label)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `input` | Character vector. Values to look up, or '"*"' for all. |
| `tbl` | Data frame. The reference table to search. |
| `name_col` | Character. Column name containing the human-readable names. |
| `id_col` | Character. Column name containing the IDs. |
| `label` | Character. Label used in error messages. |

## Value

A vector of IDs matching the input.

## Description

Generic helper that resolves human-readable names to internal FlixPatrol IDs
using a pre-built lookup table. Supports '"*"' wildcard to return all IDs.
